name: Hound Blaze (Jolly Roger Foil)
effect_text: [Main] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +3000 power during this turn. Then, place up to 1 Character with a cost of 2 or less at the bottom of the owner's deck.[Trigger] Return up to 1 Character with a cost of 3 or less to the owner's hand.
